title: taraxacum akteum
intro: Taraxacum akteum, also known as the Eastern dandelion or Greek dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter compounds, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum akteum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and lower cholesterol levels. Taraxacum akteum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with the leaves and roots being used for their medicinal properties.
